ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_location" TEXT /* Location of the requirement in the ISA documentation */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Main feature being tested */,
  "sub_feature" TEXT /* Sub-feature or specific instruction being tested */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature or sub-feature */,
  "verification_goal" TEXT /* Verification goal for the test */,
  "pass_fail_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for passing or failing the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., Compliance, Random, Directed) */,
  "coverage_method" TEXT /* Method used to cover the verification goals */,
  "link_to_coverage" TEXT /* Link to coverage data or additional documentation */,
  "fpu_required" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the feature or sub-feature requires a floating-point unit (FPU) */,
  "illegal_instructions" TEXT /* List of illegal instructions that should be correctly identified and handled */,
  "related_requirements" TEXT /* List of related requirements to ensure consistency and coverage */,
  "test_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the verification and testing of the requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the requirement (e.g., Draft, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., simulation, hardware) */,
  "test_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test (Pass/Fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "test_environment_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the test environment (e.g., simulation setup, hardware configuration) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_creator" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the test */,
  "test_executor" TEXT /* Name of the person who executed the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage data entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being covered */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., Functional, Random, Directed) */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of the coverage (e.g., specific test cases, coverage metrics) */,
  "coverage_status" TEXT /* Status of the coverage (e.g., Complete, In Progress, Not Started) */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date the coverage data was recorded */,
  "coverage_metrics" TEXT /* Specific metrics used to measure coverage */,
  "coverage_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the coverage */,
  "coverage_creator" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the coverage data */,
  "coverage_executor" TEXT /* Name of the person who executed the coverage */,
  "related_coverage" TEXT /* List of related coverage data entries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)
